sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32612" key="e)kperisseu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπερισσεύω</orth>, <sense id="n32612.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be superfluous,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.27.2.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
